message:
test(runtime): add metamorphic property tests for core Redis semantics

Add proptest-based metamorphic relations covering 9 key invariants:
- INCR/DECR additivity and inverse operations
- SET/GET and MSET/MGET round-trip
- SADD idempotence (double add == single add)
- LPUSH/LPOP and RPUSH/RPOP inverse
- LPUSH/RPOP queue ordering
- ZADD score ordering monotonicity
- DEL/FLUSHDB completeness
- EXPIRE/TTL consistency
- APPEND length additivity
- HINCRBY commutativity

These tests catch bugs that unit tests miss by verifying algebraic
properties rather than specific outputs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
